Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action
Logical input actions: named FlixelAction instances grouped in a FlixelActionSet, with tagged FlixelInputBinding and FlixelAnalogAxisBinding so keyboard, gamepad, pointer, and touch regions never share one ambiguous integer bucket.

Why use this package

Calling Flixel.keys.pressed(...) everywhere works until you add rebinding, Steam Input, or extra devices. Actions give you one place to change bindings (FlixelActionDigital.addBinding(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelInputBinding)) while gameplay keeps asking jump.justPressed().

Frame order (important)

FlixelGame.update(float) runs Flixel.keys.update(), Flixel.mouse.update(), Flixel.gamepads.update(), then FlixelActionSets.updateAll(float). Your FlixelState.update(float) runs after that, so action queries see the current frame's hardware snapshot. FlixelGame.render() ends with endFrame() on keys, mouse, gamepads, then FlixelActionSets.endFrameAll() so justPressed() / justReleased() match the rest of the engine.

Minimal workflow

  1. Subclass FlixelActionSet.
  2. Create FlixelActionDigital / FlixelActionAnalog, add bindings, add(...) each action.
  3. Hold the set while the mode is active; in update read pressed(), justPressed(), getX().
  4. Call FlixelActionSet.destroy() when leaving the mode.

Steam Input

Ship a manifest such as me/stringdotjar/flixelgdx/input/action/steam_input_manifest.vdf (resource in this module) next to your game depot under Valve's steam_input layout. Action FlixelAction.getName() strings should match manifest entries. At runtime, set FlixelActionSet.steamReader to an implementation backed by steamworks4j (or another Steamworks binding) that reads Steam Input each frame; FlixelSteamActionReaders.EMPTY is a safe default.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input
    Input event handling and device abstraction for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.gamepad
    Gamepad input support for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard
    Keyboard input support for FlixelGDX.
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.mouse
     
  • Class
    Description
    FlixelAction
    Base type for a named logical control inside a FlixelActionSet.
    FlixelActionAnalog
    Two-axis vector built from FlixelAnalogAxisBinding contributors plus optional Steam analog for FlixelAction.getName().
    FlixelActionDigital
    Boolean action: any FlixelInputBinding that evaluates true, OR optional Steam digital for the same FlixelAction.getName(), makes FlixelActionDigital.pressed() true for this frame.
    FlixelActionSet
    Groups logical FlixelAction instances (digital and analog) and advances them on the same frame contract as FlixelInputManager.
    FlixelActionSets
    Global registry of FlixelActionSet instances.
    FlixelAnalogAxisBinding
    One contributor to a FlixelActionAnalog vector.
    FlixelAnalogAxisBinding.Kind
     
    FlixelInputBinding
    Immutable description of one source for a FlixelActionDigital.
    FlixelInputBindingKind
    Discriminator for FlixelInputBinding.
    FlixelSteamActionReader
    Optional bridge for Steam Input (or similar): digital and analog values keyed by the same logical names as FlixelAction.getName().
    FlixelSteamActionReaders
    Built-in FlixelSteamActionReader instances.
